summary: Comprehensive testing of EzParts v3.0 3D Diagrams feature completed successfully. All 6 requested features are working perfectly - 4-tab interface, interactive equipment diagrams with hotspots, color-coded exploded views, 6-category part finder wizard, 3D model viewer with WebGL, and seamless navigation to parts catalog.
passed_tests: 3D Diagrams page loads successfully with proper navigation link
All 4 tabs present: Equipment Diagrams, Exploded Views, Part Finder Wizard, 3D Part Viewer
Equipment Diagrams tab displays excavator image with 6 clickable hotspots
Hotspots show interactive tooltips with part names on click/hover
Exploded Views tab renders SVG-based diagram with 6 color-coded parts
Exploded view parts respond to hover interactions with info panels
Part Finder Wizard shows 6 system categories (Engine, Hydraulics, Undercarriage, Electrical, Cooling, Filters)
Wizard step-by-step flow works: Category → Location → Part Identification → Search
Part identification result shows 'PART IDENTIFIED' with search button
3D Part Viewer tab loads Google model-viewer component successfully
WebGL 3D models load and render properly
Navigation from diagram hotspots to Parts page works perfectly
Part search transfers correctly from diagrams (e.g., 'Hydraulic Cylinder Seal Kit')
All interactive elements have proper hover states and animations
Zoom controls work on equipment diagrams
Equipment selector allows switching between Excavator, Engine, Undercarriage views
